Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David S. Rand, esq. for Plaintiff.
Abraham M. Andrade, III, esq. (650-470-4544) and Caroline Van Ness, esq. (650-470-4686) of Skadden...LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Tom Chavez's demurrer to Plaintiff Liz Sanchez's complaint is sustained with 20 days leave to amend.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
